/* Generated by EPP 1.0beta3 (by lisp-epp1.0beta3) */

;

;

class Testdefmacro {
  public static void main(String argv[]){
    System.out.println((((5) > (10))?(5):(10)) == (10)); 
    int a = 1, b = 2; 
    System.out.println(((a) == (1)) && ((b) == (2))); 
    {
      int tmp; 
      tmp = (a); 
      a = (b); 
      b = (tmp); 
      }; 
    System.out.println(((a) == (2)) && ((b) == (1))); 
    }
  }
